grandPellets.name: Grand Pellets
grandPellets.desc: Fuel Pellets · ENplus A1/A2 · EU Export

about.title: About the Group
about.text: ICG Investment & Commercial Group unites four business directions at the intersection of industry, real estate, and energy. TEHMAS is our flagship: from turnkey industrial construction to a fleet of 40+ units of own machinery. Grand Pellets exports certified fuel pellets to five EU countries. The Roof manages commercial real estate through exclusive brokerage. Zahistbud supplies industry with raw materials — sand, clay, gravel, kaolin. Each business — its own expertise, shared DNA of reliability.

gateOne.label: Flagship Project
gateOne.title: Gate One Brovary
gateOne.desc: A+ class logistics complex on the E95 highway. 7,000 m², built by TEHMAS in 36 months. Exclusive broker — The Roof.
